landing.pageTitle: Purifyt – Remove Gambling Comments on YouTube
landing.heroDesc: Purifyt detects and removes gambling comments on YouTube using AI + Selenium automation. Protect your community without manual work.
landing.featuresDesc: Two main features designed to keep your comment section clean.
landing.featureAutoDeleteDesc: Automatically delete gambling comments from your YouTube videos using Selenium automation. Just enter a Video ID and let the AI work.
landing.featurePredictDesc: Test AI predictions directly on any comment text. Perfect for verifying model accuracy before running auto-delete.
landing.howDesc: From entering a Video ID to gambling comments deleted, everything runs automatically.
landing.step1Desc: Enter the Video ID or YouTube URL you want to clean from gambling comments.
landing.step2Desc: Our AI model fetches and analyzes every comment, classifying which contain gambling content.
landing.step3Desc: The automation browser (Selenium) runs in the background, logs into YouTube and deletes detected gambling comments.
landing.step4Desc: Get a complete report: how many comments were scanned, detected, and successfully deleted.
landing.demoDesc: Here's how the automatic gambling comment deletion process looks.
landing.ctaDesc: Register and try Auto Delete or Quick Predict for free, no payment required.
landing.extensionTitle: Filter Gambling Comments Directly in YouTube
landing.extensionDesc: Install the Purifyt extension to automatically detect and hide online gambling comments while you watch YouTube — in real-time, powered by AI.
landing.extensionTagline: AI-powered online gambling filter for YouTube
landing.extensionFeature1: Detects gambling comments with 99% AI accuracy
landing.extensionFeature2: Auto-blur or hide gambling comments instantly
landing.extensionFeature3: Works in real-time as you scroll the comment section
landing.extensionFeature4: Secure — only activates on YouTube comment sections
landing.extensionNote: Chrome / Edge / Brave • Load unpacked in developer mode

footer.desc: A platform for detecting and removing online gambling comments on YouTube using artificial intelligence (AI) and Selenium automation.
footer.copyright: Built to keep YouTube content clean.

autoDelete.title: Auto Delete
autoDelete.desc: Automatically detect and delete gambling comments on YouTube using AI
autoDelete.noAccountsDesc: Please log in with a Google account first in the Google Login tab.
autoDelete.enterVideoId: Please enter a Video ID and select an account
autoDelete.previewDone: Preview done! {detected} gambling comment(s) detected out of {total}
autoDelete.scanComplete: Scan complete! {deleted} gambling comment(s) deleted out of {total}
autoDelete.showBrowserHelp: Browser window will be visible — useful for debugging
autoDelete.readyDesc: Enter a Video ID and select an account to start detecting and deleting gambling comments automatically
autoDelete.noticeDesc: Accounts with 2FA (Two-Factor Authentication) or CAPTCHA may fail to log in automatically. Temporarily disable 2FA or use Show Browser mode.
autoDelete.showBrowserCaptcha: Browser window will be visible — useful if CAPTCHA or manual verification is required
autoDelete.loginOnceDesc: Login is only required once to save the cookie. After that, the cookie will be reused automatically.
autoDelete.loginFirst: Log in with a Google account first to save a cookie.

download.label: Download
download.title: Download Purifyt Extension
download.desc: Get the latest Purifyt browser extension to detect and hide gambling comments in real-time on YouTube.
download.errorFetch: Failed to fetch releases from GitHub.
download.noReleases: No releases available yet. Check back later!
download.installNote: Chrome / Edge / Brave • Load unpacked in developer mode
download.step1: Download the .zip file from the latest release above.
download.step2: Extract the .zip file to a folder on your computer.
download.step3: Open Chrome and go to chrome://extensions.
download.step5: Click "Load unpacked" and select the extracted folder.

about.label: About Us
about.title: About Purifyt
about.desc: Learn more about our mission to keep the internet clean from online gambling spam.
about.missionDesc: Purifyt was built with one clear goal: to protect internet users, especially content creators and their communities, from the flood of online gambling spam comments on social media platforms. We believe everyone deserves a clean, safe, and positive browsing experience.
about.whatDesc: Purifyt is an AI-powered platform and browser extension that detects and removes online gambling comments across social media, starting with YouTube. It uses machine learning classification with 99% accuracy, combined with Selenium automation for automatic deletion. The browser extension provides real-time protection while you browse.
about.contactDesc: Have questions, suggestions, or found a bug? We'd love to hear from you. Open an issue on our GitHub repository or reach out through the platform.

privacy.label: Legal
privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.overviewDesc: Purifyt respects your privacy. This policy explains what data we collect, how we use it, and your rights. We are committed to transparency and only collect what is necessary to provide our services.
privacy.collectAccount: Account information: username, email, and hashed password when you register.
privacy.collectComments: YouTube comments: fetched and analyzed for gambling content classification. Comments are processed in real-time and not permanently stored unless part of a dataset you create.
privacy.collectUsage: Basic usage statistics: scan counts and detection counts (anonymized, no personal data).
privacy.useDetect: To detect and classify gambling comments using our AI model.
privacy.useImprove: To improve model accuracy and service quality.
privacy.useAuth: To authenticate your account and secure API access.
privacy.extensionDesc: The Purifyt browser extension only activates on YouTube pages. It sends YouTube comment text to our backend for classification. It does not track your browsing history, collect personal data, or access any data outside YouTube comment sections. All settings are stored locally in your browser.
privacy.thirdPartyDesc: We use the YouTube Data API to fetch comments. We do not sell, share, or transfer your data to any third party for advertising or marketing purposes.
privacy.contactDesc: If you have any questions about this privacy policy, please contact us through GitHub.

license.label: Legal
license.title: License
license.subtitle: Purifyt is open source software licensed under the MIT License.

terms.label: Legal
terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.acceptDesc: By using Purifyt (the website, API, or browser extension), you agree to these Terms of Service. If you do not agree, please do not use our services.
terms.serviceDesc: Purifyt provides AI-powered detection and removal of online gambling comments on YouTube. This includes a web dashboard, REST API, and browser extension. The service is provided as-is and we may update or change features at any time.
terms.accountDesc: You are responsible for maintaining the security of your account credentials. Do not share your password. You are responsible for all activity under your account.
terms.useAllowed1: Use Purifyt to detect and remove gambling spam from your own content.
terms.useAllowed2: Use the browser extension for personal browsing protection.
terms.useNotAllowed1: Do not use Purifyt to harass, spam, or harm others.
terms.useNotAllowed2: Do not attempt to reverse-engineer, abuse, or overload our API.
terms.disclaimerDesc: Purifyt is provided without warranties of any kind. While our AI model has 99% accuracy, no system is perfect. We are not responsible for false positives (normal comments flagged as gambling) or false negatives (gambling comments not detected).
terms.changesDesc: We may update these terms at any time. Continued use of Purifyt after changes constitutes acceptance of the updated terms.
